summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MCP Tunnel POC iteration 2 with Supabase REST client. Backend APIs working perfectly with expected table_ready=false state. Frontend functional with minor clipboard permission issue in testing environment.

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard write permission denied in testing environment
ui_bugs.note: Expected behavior in testing environment, works in real browser

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns supabase_connected=true, table_ready=false, all env flags true
GET /api/ returns root message 'MCP Supabase Tunnel — API running'
GET /api/setup-sql returns SQL instructions with table creation
POST /api/mcp/clients returns 500 with table not found error (expected)
GET /api/mcp/clients returns 500 with table not found error (expected)
Frontend loads with MCP Tunnel header and supabase realtime poc tag
Connection Status section shows Backend green, Supabase green, Table red
Setup Required section visible with SQL code block and copy sql button
Register form with name/description inputs and register button functional
Registered Clients section shows 'No clients registered yet'
Health message shows correct table not found message
